summary: Audit AI platform automating SOX control testing and workpapers.
editor_note: Audit work dies in Excel because the evidence, test matrix, and sign-off trail live in different places. Andera says its Audit AI can automate SOX control testing, email control owners, flag exceptions, and save 70% of control-testing costs. Unlike GRC suites that manage checklists, it tries to produce auditor-ready workpapers. The risk is whether external auditors trust AI-generated evidence at scale.

product_evidence.claim: The homepage says Andera automates SOX control testing and saves 70% of control-testing costs with AI and no setup needed.
The product surface shows Audit AI generating workpapers in auditor formats and reviewing Snowflake user-access control evidence.
The site describes evidence gathering by emailing control owners, checking evidence relevance, and escalating non-responses.

market_context.primary_user: Finance, internal audit, SOX, and compliance teams that still assemble evidence, workpapers, and exception follow-up manually.
market_context.differentiation: Andera tries to generate auditor-ready control-testing workpapers rather than only tracking compliance tasks.
market_context.why_now: SOX teams are under pressure to cut repetitive testing cost while keeping review trails acceptable to external auditors.

risks.claim: The risk is that customers may still need substantial human review if external auditors resist relying on AI-generated testing evidence.
risks.basis: VentureDex editorial assessment based on official product evidence and funding-source review.
